fallback_contact.name: Erin Fitzpatrick
fallback_contact.title: Vice President
fallback_contact.rationale: Listed as VP and on Board of Directors. Family-run firm — Fitzpatrick name is on multiple board seats (Blake, Jack, Garrett Fitzpatrick). Maple Leaf is heavy civil/paving (777 Erin St) and lower fit for a commercial paint sub, but Ahmad can ask about commercial buildings work / commercial development arm.

needs_review_flags: Maple Leaf Construction is primarily heavy civil / asphalt / paving — fit for commercial painting sub is limited but they do commercial development.
Currently posted: Project Manager & Estimator role — signal that estimating capacity is being built.
No publicly named individual estimator. Phone (204) 783-7091 and ask for estimating dept.

sources.claim: Board includes Erin Fitzpatrick, Barry Brown, Blake Fitzpatrick, Jack Fitzpatrick, Kevin Brown, Garrett Fitzpatrick
Erin Fitzpatrick listed as VP at Maple Leaf Construction
